prompt: Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?

inputData.question: Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which 10 courses have the highest average reported workload?"},"startedAt":1771855837651,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for the 10 courses with the highest average reported workload. I need to:
1. Join courses → course_sections → enrollments → course_evaluations
2. Calculate the average of workload_hours (from course_evaluations) grouped by course
3. Order by average workload descending and limit to 10
4. Return course name/code and the average workload

The workload_hours column in course_evaluations contains the reported workload data. I'll aggregate by course and rank by average workload.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC
LIMIT 10
","assumptions":["workload_hours in course_evaluations represents the reported workload for a course","NULL workload_hours values should be excluded from the average calculation","A course is identified by its id, code, and name from the courses table"]},"endedAt":1771855867369},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC
LIMIT 10

visualization.title: Top 10 Courses by Average Reported Workload

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC
LIMIT 10

visualization.title: Top 10 Courses by Average Reported Workload

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.code,
  c.name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS avg_workload_hours
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
WHERE ce.workload_hours IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC
LIMIT 10
